sync.title: 🔧 Server Sync
sync.all_present: ✅ Everything in place — no missing role/category/channel.

bug.panel_desc:
```
    Found a bug in the game?
    Click below to report it!
```

🔴 `CRITICAL` Game crashes
🟠 `HIGH    ` Major issue
🟡 `MEDIUM  ` Tolerable
🟢 `LOW     ` Cosmetic

> **Tip:** To attach screenshots/log files, click the **🧵 Thread** button on your bug after reporting.

> 💰 Each report earns **+30 XP**
> 🚨 Critical bugs auto-ping the dev team
> ⚠️ You'll see similar reports before submitting
bug.dev_only: 🛡️ This action is for dev/moderator roles only.
bug.assign_desc: Who should this bug be assigned to?
bug.auto_thread_welcome: 🧵 Discussion thread for this bug. You can attach screenshots, log files, or extra details here.
bug.close_report_desc:
**{tag} — {title}**

Your report was closed by **{closer}**. Thanks for flagging it.
bug.ticket_archiving: 🔒 **{tag}** closed. This channel will be archived shortly…
bug.staff_controls_header:
🛠️ **Crew Controls — {tag}**
These actions are restricted to crew members (Developer / Lead / Moderator / QA).

ticket.panel_desc:

```
   Need help?

```

────────────

verify.panel_desc:
```
   Welcome to our server!
   Sunucumuza hoş geldin!
```

**Rules / Kurallar:**
> 1. Be respectful / Herkese saygılı ol
> 2. No spam / Spam yok
> 3. No advertising / Reklam yok
> 4. No NSFW / NSFW içerik yok
> 5. Follow staff / Yetkililere uy

────────────

🌐 **1.** First, pick your language / Önce dilini seç
✅ **2.** Then accept the rules / Sonra kuralları kabul et
verify.account_too_young: ❌ Verification failed: your Discord account is too new (**{age} days old**). This server requires a minimum account age of **{required} days**. Try again later.
verify.audit_young_account: 🚨 Verification blocked: {name}'s account is only {age} days old (min: {required})
verify.rules_saved: ✅ Rules saved. The existing panel was updated automatically.

reaction_roles.panel_desc:
Which platform do you play on?
Click to get your role. Click again to remove.

────────────

You can select multiple.

welcome.title: Welcome!
welcome.dm_desc:
Welcome to **{guild}**!
**{guild}** sunucusuna hoş geldin!

🌐 Pick your language below and start exploring.
Aşağıdan dilini seç ve sunucuyu keşfetmeye başla.

**What you can do / Neler yapabilirsin:**
🐛 Report bugs / Hata bildir (+30 XP)
🎫 Open tickets / Destek talebi aç
💡 Submit suggestions / Öneri gönder
🔑 Apply for beta / Beta'ya başvur
🏅 Earn badges / Rozet kazan

📍 Head to **#verification** to continue / Devam etmek için **#verification** kanalına git

panel.tickets_desc: Open tickets and beta program status.

Users can submit questions with `/qa-soru`.
qa.already_active: A Q&A session is already open: **{topic}**. Close it first.
qa.submitted: ✅ Your question was submitted! If it gets enough votes, devs may answer it.

🚨 This is a **{sev}** severity bug reported **{minutes} minutes** ago. Immediate action needed.

raid.alert_desc: **{joins} users joined in the last {sec} seconds** — this is unusually high. Review the suspicious accounts below.
raid.footer: Bot did not auto-action. Manual review required.

trust.cmd_set_desc: Manually set a user's trust level (admin)
trust.cmd_clear_desc: Clear manual override, return to auto-calc (admin)
trust.title: 🛡️ Trust Level
trust.override_notice: ⚙️ Manual override active — auto promotion/demotion disabled.

cooldown.bug_report: ⏳ Too fast! Try again in **{s}** seconds.

status_dm.bug_claimed_desc:
**{tag}:** {title}
{dev} took this on to fix it.

help.panel_desc: Pick a category below. Learn what each command does.

sections.bugs:
**User commands:**
`/bug <id>` — View a bug
`/bugs [filter]` — List bugs
`/bug-search <text>` — Search by text
`/my-bugs` — Bugs assigned to you
`/dashboard` — Overview
`/stats` — Statistics

**How do I report?**
Click the **🐛 Report Bug** button in #bug-reports!

**XP gain:** +30 XP per report
sections.tickets:
**Open from #support-tickets:**
🔧 Technical / 👤 Account / 💰 Payment / ❓ General

**Inside-ticket commands:**
`/ticket-close [reason]` — Close ticket

**Buttons:**
🙋 Claim — A staff member claims this ticket
🔒 Close — Closes ticket (channel deleted after 10s)
sections.suggestions:
**From #suggestions:**
💡 **Submit Suggestion** button

**Commands:**
`/sugg-respond <id> <status> <response>` — Team reply

**Buttons:**
👍 Support / 👎 Oppose — Vote

Community votes surface popular ideas. Team reviews regularly.
sections.beta:
**Beta application:**
Click **🔑 Apply for Beta** in #beta-apply

**See your status:**
📋 My Status

**If approved:** Auto-DM + Beta Tester role + key
sections.profile:
`/profile [@user]` — Profile card
`/leaderboard` — Top 15 players
`/rozetler [@user]` — Earned achievements
`/my-bugs` — Bugs assigned to you

**XP Formula:**
Invites×50 + Bugs×30 + Messages = Score

**Badge examples:** 🐛 First Bug, 📨 First Invite, ⭐ Level 10, 🏆 Level 50
sections.general:
`/dil` — Change bot language (🇹🇷/🇬🇧)
`/yardim` — This guide
`/dev-register <specialty>` — Register as developer
`/dev-list` — Developer list
